titleStmt.title: SII 16.189: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 189. (A.R. No. 341 of 1915.) NEKARIKALLU, NARASAROWPET TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Nṛisiṁhasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1476 (current), Pramādi, Māgha śu. 7, Rathasaptamī corresponding to 1554 A.D., January 10, (Wednesday).

It states that the village Narasiṁhāpuram in Bellamkoṇḍa-sīma, which was formerly granted to god Narasiṁha of Nagarekallu having lain fallow on account of some political anarchy was re-granted along with some additional land sowable with one puṭṭi of seed to the same god by Jilleḷḷa Veṅgaḷayyadēva-mahārāju who obtained the Bellamkoṇḍasīma as nāyaṅkara from Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja Yara-Tirumalarājayyadēvamahārāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu
1476 Agunēṭi pramādīca saṁ
vvatsara māgha śudha 7 lu śrīmadakhi
lāṁḍakōṭi braṁhmāṁḍanāya
kulaina śrī Anaṁttācala nivāsa
śrīnagarekaṁṭīśa śrī lakṣmīnṛśiṁha
dēvuni divya śrīpādapadmaṁbulaku
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara jilleḷa veṁggaḷa
yya dēvamahārājulu sadvinayabhaya
bhaktulānu Anaṁttamulaina daṁḍamulu
samarppiṁcci yiccina bhūdānadharmaśā
sanakramameṭlannanu . śrīmadrājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratā
pa śrī sadāsivadēva mahārāya
lu vijayanagaramaṁddu vajrasiṁhvā
sanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛdhvīsāmrājyaṁ sē
yucuṁḍaṁgānu vāri rājyadhuraṁ
ddharulaina . śrīmanmahāmaṁḍḍalēśvara
rāmarāju yaraṁdirumalarājayya
dēva mahārājuluṁgāru mā nāya
ṁkkarānaku pāliṁcci yiyyanavadhari
ṁccina bellaṁkoṁḍḍasīmalōni svā
miki pūrvāna sāgivacci narasiṁhvā
puragrāmaṁ kritaṁ rājaviḍvarā
lanu koduvalupaḍi Uṁḍḍaṁgānu mē
mu Ā grāmaṁ sarvamānyaṁgānu
svāmiki Amṛtapaḷlakunnu Aṁgga
raṁggavaibhavālakunnu nagirakaṁṭṭi ce

rvu kriṁddanu raṁggapati maḍivaipu
vuṁḍu kha 1 vittanāla varimaḍinni
yī tathātithi rathasaptami puṇya
kālamaṁddu kriṣṇāgarbhamaṁddunu
sahiraṇyōdaka dāna dhārāpūrvakaṁ
gānu śrōtriyaṁ suṁkhaṁ talārikaṁ
[Aṁddi]śāṁtalu cillaralu sahāgānu
sarvamunnu sarvākrāṁttaṁgānu trivā
cikaṁgānu trikaraṇaśuddhigānu daṁ
ḍdaṁ samarppiṁcci dhāravōsi yisti
mi . yī grāmānaṁkala nidhinikṣēpa
jalapāṣāṇaAkṣīṇiĀgāmisiddha
sādhyaṁbu laniyeḍi Aṣṭabhōgatēja
svāmyālunnu svāmikaiṁkaryānaku Ava
dhariṁcci mammu rakṣiṁccukona nava
dhariṁccēdi . svadattā dviguṇaṁ pu
ṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattā
pahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁbhavētu .
dānapālanayōrmadhyē . dānātśrēyō
nupālanaṁ . dānāt svarggamavāpnōti .
pālanādacyutaṁpadaṁ . veṁgaḷayya vi
ṁnnapaṁ . maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrīṁjēyu
nu . śrīnārasiṁhvuniki rāyasaṁ
gaṁggayya Ānaṁttamulaina daṁḍḍamu
lu samarppiṁccenu . jaggaṁma dīpa
Digital edition of SII 16.189 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
